user.description: Pick a Permobil chair, or choose 'Enter MAC manually...' if it isn't listed.

manual.description: Enter the chair's Bluetooth MAC (format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Find it in the MyPermobil app or via a BLE scanner.

error.invalid_mac: Not a valid Bluetooth MAC address.

abort.no_devices_found: No Permobil ConnectMe chairs found nearby.
abort.not_supported: This device does not advertise the Permobil ConnectMe service.
